Commercial Stucco in Lee County, TX

Lee County's agricultural heritage and small-town commercial districts in Giddings and Lexington are home to businesses that take pride in their properties. Star Stucco of Austin provides commercial stucco services to property owners throughout Lee County who want durable, professional-grade exterior finishes.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Dependable Commercial Stucco for Lee County Businesses

Lee County sits in the rolling Post Oak Savannah east of Austin, where the economy is anchored by agriculture, energy services, and the small-town retail that supports these industries. Giddings serves as the county seat and commercial hub, with a downtown core of established businesses and a growing corridor along Highway 290 that attracts travelers and new enterprises.

Commercial property owners in Lee County need stucco that stands up to the area's hot summers, high humidity, and the heavy rains that sweep through the region during spring storm season. Our team selects materials and application methods calibrated for these conditions, giving your building exterior the durability to match the investment you have made in your business.

We understand that working in a smaller market means every project matters. Our crews treat Lee County commercial properties with the same professionalism and attention to detail we bring to larger metro projects, arriving on time, communicating clearly, and delivering a finished product that improves your property's appearance and value.

What's Included With Our Commercial Stucco in Lee County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Site Assessment

We inspect the building's exterior walls, substrate type, and site access at your Lee County commercial property to plan the most effective approach.

Project Planning & Scheduling

Our work plan accounts for your business operations, weather conditions, and the material logistics involved in serving the Lee County area.

Surface Preparation

Walls are thoroughly cleaned, repairs made to any damaged areas, and bonding agents applied to ensure a solid base for the stucco system.

Commercial-Grade Application

We apply stucco using commercial methods that produce consistent coverage and proper thickness across all wall surfaces.

Finish Coat & Detailing

The final coat is applied to match your preferred color and texture, with clean transitions at windows, doors, and any architectural features.

Final Inspection & Warranty

A walk-through confirms the project meets your expectations, and you receive warranty documentation covering the completed system.

Common Commercial Stucco Needs in Lee County

Lee County's established and growing commercial sector generates a steady need for quality stucco work. Here are the project types we handle most often.

New Construction Exteriors

New commercial buildings going up along Highway 290 in Giddings and at highway intersections throughout Lee County need stucco exteriors built to last in the region's humid climate.

Storefront Renovation

Downtown Giddings and Lexington storefronts benefit from updated stucco that refreshes the building's street presence and helps attract customers.

Multifamily Buildings

Small apartment buildings and workforce housing in Lee County need stucco that is low-maintenance and stands up to the wear of everyday residential use.

Office Park Stucco

Professional offices, banks, and insurance agencies in Giddings maintain a polished exterior with stucco finishes that are easy to clean and maintain.

Retail Center Restoration

Shopping areas along Highway 77 and Highway 290 benefit from stucco restoration that fixes weather damage and gives the property a fresh, updated look.

HOA Common Areas

Community facilities and entrance features at Lee County residential developments need stucco repairs and touch-ups that match the original installation.

Why Choose Us for Commercial Stucco in Lee County?

  • Commitment to serving Lee County with the same quality and professionalism we bring to larger metro projects
  • Full commercial insurance and bonding for all project sizes
  • Self-sufficient crews that arrive with all materials and equipment, minimizing delays in rural areas
  • Stucco systems designed for the high humidity and heavy rainfall common in Lee County
  • Respectful, communicative crews who keep you informed throughout the project
  • Fair, transparent pricing with no hidden charges or surprise add-ons

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Lee County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Commercial Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Schedule a Commercial Consultation

Give us a call to set up a visit to your Lee County property. We will walk the building together and discuss what you need.

2

Site Inspection & Scope

Our estimator documents the wall conditions, takes measurements, and factors in any site-specific considerations for your Lee County location.

3

Detailed Bid & Timeline

You receive a straightforward written bid with pricing, material details, and a realistic project schedule.

4

Professional Execution

Our crew completes the work on time, maintains a clean site, and walks you through the finished product before packing up.
